title: Incident Response Tool
description: Built a cybersecurity incident management platform with alert correlation, incident tracking, investigation dashboards, and log analysis capabilities. Implemented incident workflows and real-time monitoring features for security operations.

title: Authentication System
description: Developed a secure authentication and authorization system using NestJS and MongoDB. Implemented user registration, login, JWT authentication, password hashing, role-based access control, and protected API routes.

title: English Speaking App
description: Built a real-time English speaking practice platform using NestJS, PostgreSQL, and Socket.IO. Implemented live conversation rooms, instant messaging, user matching, and session management to improve spoken English skills.
